approvedAlgorithms.name: Conditioning Component Block Cipher Derivation Function SP800-90B

certificate.description: The Quadient Postal Security Device is a multi-chip standalone cryptographic module that serves as the core security component of postal franking machines and must meet physical security FIPS 140-3 level 3 requirements (as required by the USPS®).
